title: Digital survey creation by providing optimized suggested content
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a question recommendation system that intelligently optimizes a survey being created by a user by providing customized suggestions. For example, in one or more embodiments, the question recommendation system provides a suggested question based on questions previous added by a user while creating a survey. In particular, the question recommendation system provides various recommendations to the user to further optimize a survey being created. For instance, the question recommendation system provides recommendations with respect to improving question ordering, question phrasing, and question type as well as recommends removing potentially inefficient questions.
claims: 1. A computer-implemented method comprising: generating a survey graph comprising: a first node corresponding to a first encoded survey prompt representing a first survey question encoded into a vector space, the first encoded survey prompt comprising a first semantic label; and a plurality of additional nodes corresponding to additional encoded survey prompts representing additional survey questions encoded into the vector space; receiving, from an administrator client device, a user-generated survey prompt for a new digital survey; generating, from the user-generated survey prompt, a second encoded survey prompt comprising a second semantic label; determining that the second semantic label matches the first semantic label; based on determining that the second semantic label matches the first semantic label, determining to traverse the survey graph to identify a suggested survey prompt corresponding to an additional node of the plurality of additional nodes within the survey graph; providing, to the administrator client device, an option to use the suggested survey prompt; based on receiving an indication of an interaction with the option to use the suggested survey prompt, generating the new digital survey comprising the user-generated survey prompt and the suggested survey prompt; and providing, to a respondent client device, the new digital survey comprising the user-generated survey prompt and the suggested survey prompt.
